title: Immersive Web SDK npm Package Metadata
citation: Local pnpm view queries for iwsdk, @iwsdk/core, @iwsdk/vite-plugin-dev, @iwsdk/xr-input, @iwsdk/vite-plugin-gltf-optimizer, @iwsdk/vite-plugin-uikitml, @iwsdk/locomotor, @iwsdk/glxf, @iwsdk/vite-plugin-metaspatial, @iwsdk/reference, @meta-quest/hzdb, three, vite, @vitejs/plugin-react, and @img/sharp-libvips-darwin-arm64, run 2026-05-04.
permitted_uses: Dependency-risk evaluation before any OpenClinXR IWSDK spike or package installation.
claims_supported: As queried on 2026-05-04, @iwsdk/core latest is 0.3.1, MIT licensed, peers no package directly in npm metadata, and reports direct dependencies on @babylonjs/havok, @iwsdk/glxf, @iwsdk/locomotor, @iwsdk/xr-input, @pmndrs/handle, @pmndrs/pointer-events, @pmndrs/uikit, @pmndrs/uikitml, @preact/signals-core, elics, three, and three-mesh-bvh.
As queried on 2026-05-04, @iwsdk/vite-plugin-dev latest is 0.3.1, MIT licensed, depends on Playwright, iwer, @iwer/devui, @iwer/sem, sharp, ws, and @modelcontextprotocol/sdk, and peers Vite ^7.0.0.
As queried on 2026-05-04, @iwsdk/vite-plugin-gltf-optimizer latest is 0.3.1, MIT licensed, depends on @gltf-transform packages, draco3dgltf, sharp, glob, and fs-extra, and peers Vite ^7.0.0.
As queried on 2026-05-04, @iwsdk/vite-plugin-uikitml and @iwsdk/vite-plugin-metaspatial latest are 0.3.1, MIT licensed, and peer Vite ^7.0.0.

As queried on 2026-05-04, the unscoped iwsdk package was not found in the npm registry; @iwsdk/reference latest is 0.3.2, MIT licensed, exposes bin iwsdk-reference, and depends on @huggingface/transformers, @modelcontextprotocol/sdk, and tar.
As queried on 2026-05-04, @img/sharp-libvips-darwin-arm64 latest is 1.2.4 and reports license LGPL-3.0-or-later.
As queried on 2026-05-04, @meta-quest/hzdb latest is 1.1.0, exposes bin hzdb, and reports license UNLICENSED.
As queried on 2026-05-04, three latest is 0.184.0, vite latest is 8.0.10, and @vitejs/plugin-react latest is 6.0.1.
claims_not_supported: That IWSDK peer ranges have been validated with this repo's Vite 8.0.10 setup.
That @iwsdk/core's Three.js wildcard dependency will preserve OpenClinXR's current exact dependency posture without overrides or package-manager controls.
That Playwright/sharp/model-reference downloads are acceptable in unattended local verification or CI.
That IWSDK optimizer or dev-tool dependency paths using sharp will pass the OpenClinXR license gate without further review or replacement.
That @meta-quest/hzdb may be used in OpenClinXR production manifests, default verification, or committed lockfile state outside an approved sidecar.
